_description: This fixture contains only forbidden route shapes. Every route listed here must be rejected by the proof runner.

forbidden_routes.reason: Legacy docs/i18n/** path — blocked by robots.txt and URL policy. Content must live at /ru/tutorial/, not /docs/i18n/ru/tutorial/.
Legacy docs/tutorial/en/** path — English locale content embedded under /docs/tutorial/. Forbidden shape.
Source content directory exposed as a public route. /content/** paths must never appear as public URLs.
Jekyll _site output directory exposed as a public route. /_site/** paths must never appear as public URLs.
docs/i18n/** pattern — forbidden regardless of locale or surface.
docs/tutorial/en/** root — same forbidden pattern, English locale hidden under /docs/.

forbidden_locale_equivalent_violations.reason: All locale equivalents point to the same path /language/. The locale dropdown would link to itself — forbidden. Each locale must have its own distinct path.
All equivalents use forbidden /docs/** path shapes. Locale paths must follow /<locale>/<surface>/<slug>/ pattern.
